name: MATHS
description: Analog function generator. Four channels: two full-featured (1 & 4) with rise/fall/curve and cycle, two attenuverter/offset channels (2 & 3) with unity mixing.

controls.name: Curve
controls.detail: CCW: expo · noon: linear · CW: log

controls.name: Attenuverters
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

controls.name: Offset
controls.description: DC offset. Adds to SUM output.

inputs.name: CH 1 Rise CV
inputs.description: Voltage control of CH 1 rise time

inputs.name: CH 1 Fall CV
inputs.description: Voltage control of CH 1 fall time

inputs.name: CH 4 Rise CV
inputs.description: Voltage control of CH 4 rise time

inputs.name: CH 4 Fall CV
inputs.description: Voltage control of CH 4 fall time

outputs.name: CH 1 EOR
outputs.description: End-of-rise gate from CH 1 only. Goes high at peak of CH 1 envelope.

outputs.name: CH 4 EOC
outputs.description: End-of-cycle gate from CH 4 only. Goes high at end of CH 4 fall stage.

outputs.name: Unity
outputs.description: Sum of all 4 channel outputs at unity gain

outputs.name: OR
outputs.description: Maximum (analog OR) of CH 1 and CH 4

behaviors.name: Cycle Mode
behaviors.description: Self-triggering LFO. Speed set by Rise + Fall. LED indicates cycle. Syncs to trigger input when patched.

behaviors.name: Envelope
behaviors.description: ASR on sustained gate, AD on trigger. Curve knob shapes attack & decay response independently.

behaviors.name: Slew Limiter
behaviors.description: Portamento / glide. Rise = glide up speed, Fall = glide down. Asymmetric glide when set differently.

behaviors.name: Retrigger blocking
behaviors.description: MATHS ignores triggers arriving during Rise. Only retriggers during Fall. Enables analog clock division.

patchIdeas.name: Bouncing ball
patchIdeas.patch: CH1 OUT → CH4 BOTH IN · CH4 Rise CCW · Fall noon · Cycle ON · CH4 OUT → VCA

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature LFOs
patchIdeas.patch: CH1 EOR → CH4 TRIG · CH4 EOC → CH1 TRIG · Cycle OFF · 90° phase offset

patchIdeas.name: Analog clock divider
patchIdeas.patch: Clock → TRIG · Rise > clock period · retrigger blocked during Rise · non-integer division

patchIdeas.name: Directional portamento
patchIdeas.patch: Pitch CV → Signal In · Rise = glide up · Fall = glide down · asymmetric glide

patchIdeas.name: Trigger delay
patchIdeas.patch: Trigger → TRIG · Rise = delay time · EOR = delayed gate · Fall = gate length
